# Chittampalli Exports Private Limited

> India's best quality agro products are exported by Chittampalli Exports Private Limited

## About Us
Chittampalli Exports Private Limited is a premium agricultural exporter based in Karimnagar, Telangana, India. We specialize in exporting the finest quality spices, rice, pulses, fresh fruits, and vegetables to international markets worldwide.

## Company Information
- **Company Name**: Chittampalli Exports Private Limited
- **Location**: 8-1-605/3, Mahalaxmi Nagar, Karimnagar, Telangana - 505001, India
- **Email**: info@chittampalliexports.com
- **Phone/WhatsApp**: +91-6301419503
- **Website**: https://chittampalliexports.com
- **Established**: 2026

## Certifications & Registrations
- **FSSAI License**: 13626999000391
- **IEC Code**: AANCC7219H
- **FIEO Membership**: RCMC/FIEO/16852/2026-2027
- **Spices Board**: CRES/SBCB/28352/2026-2027
- **APEDA Registration**: RCMC/APEDA/29677/2026-2027

---

## Our Export Products

### 1. SPICES (Premium Quality, Spices Board Certified)

#### Red Chilli (Dried Red Chili Peppers)
- Teja Chilli
- Sannam Chilli (S4, S5, S6)
- Byadgi Chilli
- Guntur Chilli
- Kashmiri Red Chilli
- Bird's Eye Chilli
- Red Chilli Powder
- Red Chilli Flakes

#### Turmeric (Curcuma)
- Salem Turmeric
- Erode Turmeric
- Alleppey Turmeric
- Madras Turmeric
- Rajapore Turmeric
- Sangli Turmeric
- Turmeric Powder
- Raw Turmeric Fingers

#### Coriander
- Split Coriander Seeds
- Whole Coriander Seeds
- Coriander Powder
- Eagle Brand Coriander
- Scooter Brand Coriander

#### Cumin Seeds (Jeera)
- Machine Cleaned Cumin
- Sortex Cleaned Cumin
- Singapore Quality Cumin
- Europe Quality Cumin
- Black Cumin (Shah Jeera)

#### Black Pepper
- Tellicherry Black Pepper
- Malabar Black Pepper
- Black Pepper Whole
- Black Pepper Cracked
- Black Pepper Powder
- Green Peppercorns

#### Cardamom
- Green Cardamom (Small)
- Green Cardamom (Bold)
- Black Cardamom
- Cardamom Seeds

#### Cloves
- Whole Cloves
- Clove Stems
- Madagascar Cloves
- Indonesian Cloves

#### Cinnamon & Cassia
- Ceylon Cinnamon Sticks
- Cassia Bark
- Cinnamon Powder
- Cassia Splits

#### Fennel Seeds (Saunf)
- Green Fennel Seeds
- Singapore Fennel
- Lucknow Fennel
- European Fennel

#### Fenugreek Seeds (Methi)
- Bold Fenugreek
- Common Fenugreek
- Machine Cleaned Fenugreek

#### Mustard Seeds
- Yellow Mustard Seeds
- Black Mustard Seeds
- Brown Mustard Seeds

#### Ginger
- Dried Ginger
- Fresh Ginger
- Ginger Powder
- Cochin Ginger
- Calicut Ginger

#### Garlic
- Dried Garlic Flakes
- Garlic Powder
- Fresh Garlic
- Garlic Granules

#### Ajwain (Carom Seeds)
- Natural Ajwain Seeds
- Sortex Quality Ajwain

#### Curry Leaves (Dried)
- Premium Dried Curry Leaves
- Curry Leaf Powder

#### Bay Leaves (Tej Patta)
- Whole Dried Bay Leaves

#### Star Anise
- Whole Star Anise
- Broken Star Anise

#### Nutmeg & Mace
- Whole Nutmeg
- Ground Nutmeg
- Mace Blades
- Mace Powder

#### Tamarind
- Seedless Tamarind
- Tamarind with Seeds
- Tamarind Paste

#### Dried Red Chilli Varieties
- Guntur Sannam (S4)
- Teja (S17)
- Byadgi
- Kanthari
- Mundu

---

### 2. RICE (Basmati & Non-Basmati)

#### Basmati Rice
- 1121 Basmati White Sella
- 1121 Basmati Golden Sella
- 1121 Basmati Steam Rice
- 1121 Basmati Raw Rice
- 1509 Basmati White Sella
- 1509 Basmati Golden Sella
- 1509 Basmati Steam Rice
- Pusa Basmati Rice
- Traditional Basmati Rice
- Sharbati Basmati Rice

#### Non-Basmati Rice
- Sona Masoori Rice (Steam)
- Sona Masoori Rice (Raw)
- IR 64 Parboiled Rice (5% broken)
- IR 64 Parboiled Rice (25% broken)
- Swarna Rice
- Ponni Rice
- Parmal Rice
- Kolam Rice
- HMT Rice
- Miniket Rice

#### Broken Rice
- 100% Broken Rice
- Brewers Rice
- Rice Grits

---

### 3. PULSES & LENTILS

#### Chickpeas (Chana)
- Kabuli Chana (White Chickpeas)
- Desi Chana (Brown Chickpeas)
- Split Chickpeas (Chana Dal)

#### Toor Dal (Pigeon Peas)
- Toor Dal Plain
- Toor Dal Oily

#### Moong Dal (Green Gram)
- Whole Moong (Green Gram)
- Split Moong (Yellow Moong Dal)
- Moong Chilka
- Polished Moong Dal

#### Urad Dal (Black Gram)
- Whole Urad (Black Lentils)
- Split Urad (White Lentils)
- Urad Gota
- Split & Polished Urad

#### Masoor Dal (Red Lentils)
- Whole Masoor
- Split Masoor Dal
- Red Lentils (Malka Masoor)

#### Chana Dal (Bengal Gram)
- Premium Chana Dal
- Bold Size Chana Dal

#### Kidney Beans
- Rajma Red
- Rajma White (Kashmiri Rajma)
- Chitra Rajma

#### Other Pulses
- Black Eyed Beans (Lobia)
- Green Peas (Dried)
- Yellow Peas (Dried)
- Moth Beans
- Horse Gram (Kulthi Dal)

---

- Robusta Bananas
- Red Bananas
- Papayas
- Pineapples
- Guavas
- Passion Fruit
- Dragon Fruit

#### Pomegranates
- Bhagwa Pomegranates
- Arakta Pomegranates
- Ruby Pomegranates

- Oranges (Nagpur)
- Sweet Lime (Mosambi)
- Lemons
- Tangerines

#### Grapes
- Thompson Seedless Grapes
- Flame Seedless Grapes
- Black Grapes

#### Stone Fruits
- Sapota (Chikoo)
- Custard Apple

#### Seasonal Fruits
- Watermelons
- Muskmelons
- Litchis
- Jackfruit

---

### 5. FRESH VEGETABLES

#### Leafy Vegetables
- Okra (Ladies Finger)
- Bitter Gourd (Karela)
- Bottle Gourd (Lauki)
- Ridge Gourd (Turai)
- Ivy Gourd (Tindora)
- Snake Gourd
- Brinjal (Eggplant/Aubergine)
- Drumstick (Moringa)
- Cluster Beans (Guar)

#### Root Vegetables
- Potatoes
- Sweet Potatoes
- Onions (Red & White)
- Garlic (Fresh)
- Ginger (Fresh)
- Carrots
- Radish
- Beetroot
- Turnips

#### Gourds & Squash
- Pumpkin
- Ash Gourd (Winter Melon)
- Cucumber
- Zucchini

#### Peppers & Chillies
- Green Chillies
- Red Chillies (Fresh)
- Bell Peppers (Capsicum)
- Banana Peppers

#### Tomatoes
- Fresh Red Tomatoes
- Cherry Tomatoes

#### Cabbage Family
- Cabbage
- Cauliflower
- Broccoli

#### Beans & Pods
- Green Beans (French Beans)
- Flat Beans
- Hyacinth Beans
- Broad Beans

#### Others
- Green Peas (Fresh)
- Corn (Sweet Corn)
- Baby Corn
- Mushrooms
- Curry Leaves (Fresh)
- Coriander Leaves (Fresh)
- Mint Leaves
- Spinach

- Foxtail Millet
- Little Millet
- Barnyard Millet
- Kodo Millet
- Proso Millet

#### Other Cereals
- Wheat
- Maize (Corn)
- Barley

- Curry Powder
- Sambhar Powder
- Rasam Powder
- Chaat Masala

---

## Export Markets
We export to:
- Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain)
- Europe (UK, Germany, France, Netherlands, Belgium)
- Southeast Asia (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia)
- Africa (South Africa, Kenya, Tanzania, Nigeria)
- North America (USA, Canada)
- Australia & New Zealand

## Quality Standards
- FSSAI Food Safety Certified
- APEDA Registered for Agricultural Products
- Spices Board Certified for Spice Exports
- FIEO Member - Export Promotion
- IEC Authorized by DGFT
- Phytosanitary Compliance
- Export-Grade Packaging
- Cold Chain Logistics
- Fumigation Certified

## Why Choose Chittampalli Exports?
1. **Direct Farm Sourcing** - Traceable supply chains from verified farms
2. **Quality Assured** - Rigorous grading and quality control
3. **Five Major Certifications** - FSSAI, APEDA, FIEO, IEC, Spices Board
4. **Export Expertise** - Full documentation and customs support
5. **Cold Chain Infrastructure** - Maintains freshness from farm to port
6. **Global Reach** - Established shipping routes to 40+ countries
7. **Competitive Pricing** - Direct sourcing eliminates middlemen
8. **Dedicated Support** - Named relationship manager for each client

For enquiries, samples, pricing, or bulk orders:

- **Phone/WhatsApp**: +91-6301419503
- **Website**: https://chittampalliexports.com
- **Address**: 8-1-605/3, Mahalaxmi Nagar, Karimnagar, Karim Nagar District, Telangana, India - 505001

*Chittampalli Exports Private Limited - Bringing India's finest farm harvests to tables across the world.*
